headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Southern, Lowers Price Target to $100
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains Southern (NYSE:SO) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $103 to $100.

raw.headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Southern, Lowers Price Target to $100
raw.summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains Southern (NYSE:SO) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $103 to $100.

headline: DevvStream, XCF Global, and Southern Energy Renewables Confirm Three-Party Business Combination Remains on Track
summary: CALGARY, Alberta, May 29, 2026--DevvStream Corp. (NASDAQ: DEVS) ("DevvStream" or the "Company"), XCF Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: SAFX) ("XCF"), and Southern Energy Renewables Inc. ("Southern") (together, the "Parties") wish to clarify recent media coverage that mischaracterized a current report on Form 8-K filed by DevvStream with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC") on May 18, 2026 (the "8-K").
